title: Cortex Contracts Surface
subtitle: Every Zod schema and provider interface — v2.1.0 (Gap 1 layered defence)
purpose: Tracks what's defined in @kybernesis/cortex-contracts. Source of truth is cortex-spec.md §10 in the brain. Status flips to 'complete' when the Zod schema validates sample data round-trips in a test. v2.1.0 adds Gap 1 layered defence types: stopword control + minMatchRatio on FactRetrievalInput and FactsFulltextSearchOpts.

rows.name: Memory
evolution: v0.1 initial

v0.x: ADR 007 §3.1 — +status: 'active'|'archived'|'deleted' (Brain audit revealed Memory.status is a domain feature, not a Convex artifact; KyberBot also has it). ingest.storeMemory defaults status to 'active'.
v0.x: ADR 007 §3.2 — +isLatest: boolean (required) and +supersededBy?: string. Memory-level supersession mirrors the fact-level pattern from ADR 006. ingest.storeMemory defaults isLatest to true.

rows.name: Fact
evolution: v0.1 initial: required (entity, attribute, value) triple
v0.x: ADR 004 — fact (sentence) required; attribute/value optional. Fits both real-world fact extractors (KyberBot sentences, Kyber in Cloud sentences-with-optional-decomposition).

v0.x: ADR 008 analysis confirmed — expiresAt, surprisalScore, lastReinforcedAt ARE in FactSchema (contracts complete) but are NOT used by any kernel method or sleep pipeline step yet. These are contracts-ahead-of-kernel.

v1.0.0: ADR 013 — BREAKING. entity (string) → entities (string[], min 1). category required (FactCategorySchema 8-member enum, ported verbatim from KB fact-store.ts:38-46). sourceMemoryId/sourcePath/sourceConversationId optional source backlinks. widenLegacyFact(old) helper exported for in-code migration of pre-v1.0.0 facts.

rows.name: FactCategory
evolution: v1.0.0: ADR 013 — new 8-member Zod enum (biographical|preference|event|relationship|temporal|opinion|plan|general). Verbatim from KyberBot fact-store.ts:38-46. Used by FactSchema.category (required) and searchFactsFulltext.opts.category (optional filter).

rows.name: Contradiction
evolution: v0.1 initial: id, factAId, factBId, status, resolution?, createdAt
v0.x: ADR 006 — +rationale?: string (why detected, distinct from resolution which is how-resolved). Driven by KyberBot module #11 surfacing real Haiku-extracted rationale data.

rows.name: ProfileEntry
evolution: v0.x: ADR 007 §4 — new schema; replaces string[] in EntityProfile.staticFacts. Fields: value (required), factId?, confidence?, recordedAt?. Flat-string callers migrate by wrapping each string in {value}.

rows.name: EntityProfile
evolution: v0.1 initial: staticFacts: string[]
v0.x: ADR 007 §4 — staticFacts: ProfileEntry[]. Adds provenance (factId), confidence, and recordedAt per entry. KyberBot flat-strings migrate trivially as {value}.

rows.name: StructuredStore
evolution: v0.1 initial
v0.x: +deleteEntity (ADR 002, 2026-05-18, driven by kyberbot module #2)
v0.x: +updateMemory (ADR 005, 2026-05-18, Memory not append-only; unblocks pin/moveToTier and orphan-mirror fix)
v0.x: +markFactSuperseded (ADR 006, 2026-05-18, driven by kyberbot module #11 supersede write-path)
v0.x: +markMemorySuperseded (ADR 007 §3.2, 2026-05-19, memory-level supersession mirroring the fact-level pattern)
v0.2.0: +searchFulltext (2026-05-20, FTS+hybrid sprint) — provider-owned full-text index with normalized 0..1 score and matchedFields; libsql uses FTS5 virtual table, future postgres uses tsvector
v0.2.0: getFactsForEntity gained optional asOf: string ISO-8601 (2026-05-20) — bitemporal valid-time filter; backward compatible

v1.0.0: BREAKING — getFactsForEntity now matches v1.0.0 Fact.entities[] denormalised list (case-insensitive LIKE + post-filter); +searchFactsFulltext(query, opts) — direct fact-level FTS over content + entities, with category + latestOnly filters (libsql uses facts_fts FTS5 virtual table); +getFact(id) — single-fact lookup needed by factRetrieval Layer 0.

rows.name: LLMProvider
rows.concrete_impl: v0.5.0 — first concrete implementation ships as @kybernesis/cortex-provider-llm-claude-code (subprocess transport, no API key). HTTP-transport sibling (cortex-provider-llm-http: Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini/Ollama/OpenRouter) queued, separate sprint per ADR 012.

rows.name: FulltextSearchOpts
rows.note: scopes/tier/topK/fields filtering at the index layer

sections.label: Layered defence types (v2.1.0 — Gap 1)
sections.note: Three-mechanism design: (1) stopwords remove noise tokens from FTS queries, (2) minMatchRatio floor drops facts below word-overlap threshold before scoring, (3) minTokenLength drops short tokens from FTS. Together these close the q-events-april parity gap.

rows.name: FactsFulltextSearchOpts
rows.note: Extends StructuredStore.searchFactsFulltext opts. Added: stopwordsAdd?: string[] (merge with DEFAULT_STOPWORDS), stopwordsRemove?: string[] (carve-outs from default set), minTokenLength?: number (default 2, inherited from buildFtsQuery)
evolution: v1.0.0: initial — category?: FactCategory, latestOnly?: boolean
v2.1.0: Gap 1 — +stopwordsAdd?, +stopwordsRemove?, +minTokenLength? (all optional; callers that pass nothing get DEFAULT_STOPWORDS + minTokenLength 2)

rows.name: FactRetrievalInput
rows.note: factRetrieval() input type in cortex-core. Added: minMatchRatio?: number (default 0.2, drops facts where wordMatchRatio below floor), stopwordsAdd?, stopwordsRemove?, minTokenLength? — all passed through to searchFactsFulltext
evolution: v0.4.1: initial — query, topK, includeMemories?, tokenBudget?, category?
v2.1.0: Gap 1 — +minMatchRatio? (default 0.2), +stopwordsAdd?, +stopwordsRemove?, +minTokenLength?

rows.name: DEFAULT_STOPWORDS
rows.note: 30 English common words exported from @kybernesis/cortex-provider-libsql. Applied to all buildFtsQuery calls. Callers can extend (stopwordsAdd) or carve out (stopwordsRemove).
evolution: v2.1.0: initial — set of 30 words ('the','a','an','is','are','was','were','be','been','being','have','has','had','do','does','did','will','would','could','should','may','might','shall','can','need','this','that','these','those','it')
